response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack developer with broad web, backend, and some embedded-adjacent experience, but the role's hard requirements are not met: no native-level Japanese proficiency, no demonstrated C/UNIX systems development at depth, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no background in LAN-switch security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP). Brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (~6 months, a decade ago) and general Linux familiarity do not bridge the gap to embedded networking firmware security work.
strengths: Long track record as a senior engineer across diverse stacks and domains
Some C/C++ exposure (National Instruments LabWindows/CVI) and Linux familiarity
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: No Linux kernel source-level modification or embedded firmware experience
No demonstrated security/networking expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, switch chips)

key_factors.factor: No embedded C / Linux kernel / switch experience
Senior engineering breadth and testing discipline
